_doc.description: TBT-Game terrain definitions with immunity-based status effects
_doc.usage: Each terrain type defines conditional properties based on unit ElementalType

properties.walkable: Boolean (1/0) - can units enter this terrain? Supports unit-type overrides
properties.movePenalty: Float - movement cost multiplier (1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double cost, 0.5 = half cost)
properties.attackMultiplier: Float - damage multiplier when attacking from this terrain
properties.defenseModifier: Float - defense bonus when standing on this terrain
properties.avoidModifier: Float - avoid/dodge bonus when standing on this terrain
properties.terrainStatusImmunity: Array of status effect names this terrain blocks
properties.description: String - flavor text description of the terrain

examples.conditional_movement: Forest has movePenalty 2 for most units, 1 for Plant units
examples.terrain_immunity: Water terrain immune to Scorch/Ignite (fire can't burn water)
examples.combat_bonuses: Chivalric units get 1.4x attack multiplier in Castle terrain

design_notes: Default vulnerability: All terrains affected by all status effects unless listed in terrainStatusImmunity
Unit typing: Uses ElementalType.ToString() from CharacterData.primaryType
Terrain hierarchy: Plains (basic) -> specialized terrains with conditional bonuses
Weather integration: Terrain status effects double as weather conditions

Agriculture._doc: Farmland, vulnerable to fire, neutral defensive properties, slight bonuses to Plant units

Crater.doc: Rough terrain that applies a defensive penalty to grounded units, fliers can traverse with normal movement cost and without defensive penalties.

Desert._doc: Dry, sandy; avoid penalty for grounded units

EcoHazard._doc: Toxic terrain, hazardous to most units except Obsidian, Occult, and Void types

EcoMass._doc: Solid mass of corrupted earth, hazardous to most units except Obsidian, Occult, and Void types

Forest._doc: Forest floor without plant cover, neutral defensive properties, slight bonuses to Plant units, vulnerable to fire

Grass._doc: Basic grassy terrain, vulnerable to fire, no cover bonuses, we may just replace plains with this. tbd

Ground._doc: Basic ground terrain, grounds electric attacks, no cover bonuses

HotForest._doc: Forest floor without plant cover, in a hot climate. Resistant to fire, neutral defensive properties, slight bonuses to Plant units

IceStructures._doc: Natural ice formations, extremely difficult to traverse, cold slightly impedes flying units as well. Immune to freezing effects, massive bonus to ice attacks

Junk._doc: Robot scrap yard. Slight movement penalty, bonuses to robo units. Resistant to fire and electricity.

Marsh._doc: Wet, swampy terrain. High movement cost for grounded units. Slight defense bonus, heavy avoid penalty. Vulnerable to electricity.

PolarIce._doc: Ice-covered terrain, difficult to traverse, cold slightly impedes flying units as well. Immune to freezing effects, amplifies Ice and Electric attacks

SpaceShip._doc: Defensive bonus to grounded units, fliers can traverse with normal movement cost but without defensive bonuses.

StoneEdifice._doc: Stone buildings, resistant to fire, strong defensive properties, bonuses to Gentry units

WoodenEdifice._doc: Wooden buildings, vulnerable to fire, moderate defensive properties, slight bonus to Heraldic units
